creator: xaa+fbsdbug@dohd.org
text:
I've checked the similar case I have (cannot ezjail-admin delete -w on 12.x and 13.x) with fstat to see if it would give more clues than lsof. No change there.

For now I changed my unattended installs back to 13.0, but if there are things that need testing, I can make a test setup.

I am assuming the attended install has no issues, since that would be part of the quality control obviously :)
